---
title: "Appendix to the Assignment 1"
editor: visual
author: Duc Hoang
date: today
format: 
    html:
      toc: true
      theme: litera
      number-sections: true
    pdf: 
      documentclass: article
      fontsize: 11pt
      geometry:                 
        - top=15mm
        - left=20mm
        - right=15mm
        - bottom=15mm
      number-sections: true
execute:
    echo: false
    warning: false
    message: false
---
In the **Assignment 1**, I have used AI to help me with my code, my file formating and my way around English literacy.

Here are
